text:
Date of Death Most current date of death in Medicare records (BENE_DEATH_DT) DATE 8 x x x x x x x x x x x
SEX_CD2 Sex Code Most current sex in Medicare records (BENE_LCL_SEX_CD); (0 = Unknown; 1 = Male; 2 = Female) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x x x x x
RACE_CD Race Code Most current race in Medicare records (BENE_RACE_CD); (0 = Unknown; 1 = White; 2 = Black; 3 = Other; 4 = Asian; 5 = Hispanic; 6 = North American Native) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x x x x x
M01_ENROLL Month January Eligibility Flag Monthly
